originalTitle: Sony’s new fight stick and gaming monitor launch in August
summary: Sony is sharing new details about some of its upcoming gaming-focused hardware, including pricing and August launch dates for its FlexStrike fight stick and its 27-inch monitor. The FlexStrike fight stick will be available starting August 6th - the same day as the new PlayStation-published fighting game Marvel Tōkon: Fighting Souls - and will cost […]
content: Sony is sharing new details about some of its upcoming gaming-focused hardware, including pricing and August launch dates for its FlexStrike fight stick and its 27-inch monitor. The FlexStrike fight stick will be available starting August 6th — the same day as the new PlayStation-published fighting game Marvel Tōkon: Fighting Souls — and will cost $199.99. Preorders begin on June 12th at 10AM ET. Initially, the FlexStrike will work just on PS5, but Sony says that PC support will be rolled out sometime after launch. The stick will come with a sling carry case and a built-in rechargeable battery. Sony goes into more detail about the fight stick in a new video: [Media: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=iWu1CgJDPw0] Sony’s new 27-inch PlayStation-branded gaming monitor launches on August 27th and will cost $349.99, with preorders starting on June 5th at 10AM ET. The monitor has a 2560 x 1440 IPS display with VRR, and Sony says it supports up to 120Hz with the PS5 and PS5 Pro and up to 240Hz with compatible PCs or Macs. The monitor has a dedicated hook that can pop out from the back of the monitor to charge a DualSense controller, too — looks super handy. [Media: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=-f1FCpaawmI] The company also says that its Pulse Elevate wireless speakers, announced last September, will launch “later this year.” Sony hasn’t given a price, but says that it will have more to share “soon.”
chineseTitle: 索尼将于八月推出新的战斗摇杆和游戏显示器
chineseSummary: 索尼正在分享有关即将推出的一些游戏专用硬件的新细节，包括 FlexStrike 战斗杆和 27 英寸显示器的定价和 8 月份发布日期。 FlexStrike 格斗棒将于 8 月 6 日开始发售，与 PlayStation 发布的新格斗游戏 Marvel Tōkon: Fighting Souls 同日发售，售价为 [...]
chineseContent: 索尼正在分享有关即将推出的一些游戏专用硬件的新细节，包括 FlexStrike 战斗杆和 27 英寸显示器的定价和 8 月份发布日期。 FlexStrike 格斗棒将于 8 月 6 日开始发售，与 PlayStation 发布的新格斗游戏 Marvel Tōkon: Fighting Souls 同日发售，售价 199.99 美元。预订将于美国东部时间 6 月 12 日上午 10 点开始。最初，FlexStrike 仅适用于 PS5，但索尼表示 PC 支持将在发布后的某个时间推出。该手杖配有一个吊带手提箱和一个内置可充电电池。索尼在新视频中详细介绍了战斗杆：[媒体：https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=iWu1CgJDPw0] 索尼全新 27 英寸 PlayStation 品牌游戏显示器将于 8 月 27 日推出，售价 349.99 美元，预订将于美国东部时间 6 月 5 日上午 10 点开始。该显示器具有带 VRR 的 2560 x 1440 IPS 显示屏，索尼表示，它支持 PS5 和 PS5 Pro 高达 120Hz，兼容 PC 或 Mac 高达 240Hz。该显示器有一个专用挂钩，可以从显示器背面弹出，为 DualSense 控制器充电 - 看起来超级方便。 [媒体：https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=-f1FCpaawmI] 该公司还表示，去年 9 月宣布的 Pulse Elevate 无线扬声器将于“今年晚些时候”推出。索尼尚未给出价格，但表示“很快”将分享更多产品。
whyItMatters: 这条信息属于 AI 与科技趋势信号，适合用于观察工具选型、产品机会、开发者关注点和技术路线变化。
